=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 5/2/03, Atlanta, Georgia, 10th Annual Music Midtown Festival, Dodge/96 Rock/UPN Atlanta Stage

unknown rec. A lot of pops during "LARS" and " All Along The Watchtower", at the beginning of "Drifter's Escape"
Good sound

1-4 Sheryl Crowe set

5 intro 
6 To Be Alone With You   (Bob on piano)
7 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel)
8 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano)
9 Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues (Bob on piano)
10 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp and electric guitar)
11 She Belongs To Me (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel)
12 Honest With Me (Bob on pinao, Larry on slide guitar)
13 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass)

(encore)
14 Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano)
15 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano)



Concert # 1512 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 11 of the 2003 US Spring Tour. 2003 concert # 22.
Concert # 11 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Receli (drums & percussion).

1-4, 6-10 Bob Dylan (piano).
2, 6 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
2, 5, 6 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
5 Bob Dylan (guitar).
7 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).

Note. The abbreviated set was due to a heavy rain storm earlier in the evening.
